visor.options.common.vr_play_mode.toolti:
Choose VR Play Mode. 

1) Enabled - VR will be active while headset is on 
2) World Only - VR will be initialized but inactive in main menu and active while in game 
3) Always - VR will be always active 
4) Disabled - VR won't be initialized (NonVR)
visor.options.presets.apply_preset.toolt:
§bApply preset§r

Applies the selected preset instantly

§7For built-in presets, some addons may open a different menu for extra configuration before applying
visor.options.presets.presets_folder.too:
§bOpen Presets folder§r

It will open the folder where custom presets are saved

§7You can share presets with your friends! Just send your preset and ask friend to drop it to this folder and relaunch the game
visor.options.presets.name: Name
visor.options.presets.types.defaults.des: The preset with default settings for everything
visor.options.presets.types.defaults_han:
The defaults preset alternative with
HUD elements attached to hand
visor.options.movement.mode.tooltip:
§bMovement Mode§r

§e•§r §eController§r — Vanilla-like movement with the joystick
§e•§r §eTeleport§r — Teleport to a desired location with the joystick

§cWarning:§r VR servers may override your preferred mode. If the server uses a different mode, your choice will be ignored.
§7Teleportation requires server-side Visor support to function.§r
visor.options.movement.rotation_mode.too:
§bRotation Mode§r

Choose which VR device controls
your player's head rotation.

§e•§r Main Hand / Offhand controller
§e•§r HMD §7(headset)§r
visor.options.movement.rotation_fly_mode:
§bRotation Fly Mode§r

Choose which VR device controls
your player's rotation §ewhile flying§r.

§e•§r Main Hand / Offhand controller
§e•§r HMD §7(headset)§r
visor.options.movement.world_rotation.sm:
§bSmooth rotation sensitivity§r

Choose the rotation step as Smooth and configure the sensitivity here
visor.options.movement.world_rotation.st:
§bRotation Step§r

How many §edegrees§r the world rotates per snap-turn step.

Alternatively, choose §eSmooth§r, for smooth rotation
visor.options.movement.walk_up.tooltip:
§bWalk Up§r

Automatically step up onto blocks while walking.
visor.options.movement.compatible_look_d:
§bCompatible Look Direction§r

Uses the §eHMD direction§r as your default reported look direction.

When you actively use an item, the look direction temporarily follows the §eusing hand§r instead.

§7This can help mods that depend on player look direction, but it is a best-effort compatibility mode and may change aiming behavior.§r
visor.options.gui.shader_gui_render.tool:
§bShaders GUI§r

§7This feature is currently
in development.§r
visor.options.gui.keyboard.auto_layout.t:
§bAuto Keyboard layout§r

§7If enabled, the selected keyboard layouts list is affected by game language
visor.options.rendering.mirror_mode.tool:
§bDesktop Mirror§r

§e•§r §eOFF§r — No mirror §7(best performance)§r
§e•§r §eGUI§r — GUI only
§e•§r §eCropped / Single§r — One eye view
§e•§r §eDual§r — Both eyes side-by-side
§e•§r §e1st Person§r — Undistorted first-person
§e•§r §e3rd Person§r — Third-person camera
§e•§r §eMixed Reality§r — Composite view
visor.options.rendering.mirror_eye.toolt:
§bMirror Eye§r

Choose which eye to display on the desktop mirror window.

§e•§r §eLeft§r or §eRight§r eye
visor.options.rendering.dh_mirror_passes:
§bDistant Horizons in Mirror§r

Also renders Distant Horizons LODs in the desktop
mirror camera (1st/3rd person view).

§e•§r §eOFF§r — LODs only in the VR eyes §7(recommended)§r
§e•§r §eON§r — LODs in the mirror too, but DH re-creates
its render textures every frame §7(heavy stutter)§r
visor.options.rendering.shaders.per_eye_:
§bPer-Eye Pipelines§r

Gives each eye its own isolated shader pipeline
(own TAA history and temporal state).

§e•§r §aON§r — correct temporal effects §7(recommended)§r
§e•§r §eOFF§r — one shared pipeline: less VRAM, but
temporal shaders (TAA, SSR) may shimmer or ghost

§7Applies on the next frame (brief shader reload).§r
visor.options.rendering.shaders.shared_s:
§bShared Shadow Map§r

Renders the shadow map once per frame and shares it
between the eyes instead of rendering it per eye.

§e•§r §eOFF§r — per-eye shadows §7(stable, recommended)§r
§e•§r §aON§r — better performance, but may cause a subtle
world shimmer with TAA §7(experimental)§r

§7Applies on the next frame (brief shader reload).§r

§bShared Shader Buffers (SSBO)§r

Shares one set of shader storage buffers (e.g. colored
lighting voxel data) between the eye pipelines.

§e•§r §aON§r — single allocation §7(recommended; needed for
heavy packs like Complementary/Spooklementary Ultra)§r
§e•§r §eOFF§r — full isolation: each eye gets its own copy,
which can exhaust VRAM on heavy packs

§7Applies on the next frame (brief shader reload).§r
visor.options.rendering.eye_effects.low_:
§bHealth Indicator§r

Pulses the screen §cred§r when your health is low.
visor.options.rendering.eye_effects.hit_:
§bHit Indicator§r

Flashes a §cred§r effect on the screen when you take damage.
visor.options.rendering.eye_effects.free:
§bFreeze Effect§r

Tints the screen §9blue§r when your
player is freezing.
§7(e.g. standing in powdered snow)§r
visor.options.rendering.eye_effects.pump:
§bPumpkin Effect§r

Shows an §6orange vignette§r overlay when wearing a pumpkin on your head.

visor.action_sets.menu.tooltip: Active in the Main Menu and when GUI Screen is opened
visor.action.options.key_modifier_toolti:
§bKey Modifier§r

Enable a key modifier for this profile.

When enabled, the trigger on each controller
acts as a modifier key §7(like Shift or Ctrl on a keyboard)§f and will no longer be
available for direct binding.
visor.action.options.add_key_action_tool:
§bAdd Key Action§r

Create a new action that emulates a keyboard key press in VR.
visor.action.options.hand.tooltip:
§bHand Preference§r

Switch between §eLeft-handed§r and
§eRight-handed§r binding layouts.
visor.action.options.add_key_action.type:
§bAction ID§r

§7Requirements:§r
§e•§r Minimum §e3§r characters
§e•§r Only digits, latin characters and '_' are allowed
§e•§r Must be unique across all actions in this action set

§aTip:§r Type something to avoid any potential collision with built-in actions
§7Example: 'blablabla1', 'my_key_x'

§bAction Name§r

A display name for this key action.

§7Requirements:§r
§e•§r Minimum §e3§r characters

§aTip:§r Include the key in the name for easy reference.
§7Example: "Open ModMenu (H key)"§r

§bAction Key§r

The keyboard key to emulate when this action is triggered.

§7Requirements:§r
§e•§r Enter a §esingle character§r

§aNote:§r Uppercase character means Shift or Caps Lock is held down, you won't need it in most cases, use lowercase instead
visor.action.options.bindings.key_modifi:
§bKey Modifier§r

Select which key modifier to use
for this binding.
visor.action.options.bindings.capture_in:

§eVR controller button§r you want
to assign to this binding.

Enter the icon resource path.

§7Format: resource:path/to/icon.png

§cId supports only digits, latin lowercased letters and underscores.

visor.messages.error.summary:
It can be due to:

1) VR not found. Have you launched VR runtime? (SteamVR or other).
If you use linux, join our discord community for more info

2) You have updated Visor version, that significantly changed configs. Try to remove config/Visor folder

3) Issue that wasn't fixed


§rYou can report this issue in our Visor Discord community.

Open your Logs folder (using the button below) and upload the 'latest.log' file, along with details of what you were doing and where the error occurred, to the appropriate discord channel for assistance.
visor.messages.vr_init_failed: VR failed to start — playing in non-VR mode.
visor.messages.calibrate_height: Please calibrate your height in the pause menu.
visor.messages.height_calibration_failed: Height calibration failed: headset pose unavailable. Make sure your headset is on and tracking, then try again.
